data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimize interactive buttons and links for faster user interactions.
data.technical_spec: Increase size and proximity of actionable items.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimize decision time by reducing choices displayed at once.
data.technical_spec: Implement progressive disclosure to manage complexity.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limit cognitive load by structuring information in chunks.
data.technical_spec: Ensure information is grouped into 5 to 9 items.

data.title: Doherty Threshold
data.description: Create system responses within 400ms to maintain user attention.
data.technical_spec: Optimize server responses and frontend rendering times.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Enhance perceived usability by improving visual design.
data.technical_spec: Use a clean, modern aesthetic that aligns with brand identity.
